home.tagline: Custom software and AI workflows for Latin American businesses
home.description: We build tailored software solutions and AI-powered workflows for businesses ready to transform how they operate.
home.whoDesc: Catopia de Chen Antúnez is a software and AI solutions firm based in Paraguay, serving clients across Latin America. We combine engineering rigour with deep regional understanding to deliver software that fits.

software.title: Custom Software Design
software.description: We design and build software tailored to your business processes — from internal tools to customer-facing applications. Every solution is architected to scale with your growth.

ai.title: AI Agent Workflow Integration
ai.description: We embed intelligent AI agents into your existing workflows, automating repetitive tasks and enabling smarter, faster decision-making across your entire team.

yuejie.name: Yue Jie Zhang
yuejie.bio: Software engineer with 2 years of experience operating Hospital Information Systems at enterprise scale — managing mission-critical infrastructure across hundreds of medical facilities with zero tolerance for downtime. That environment sharpened a deep instinct for building software that holds up in production. Now applying those same principles to design tailored solutions and AI-powered workflows that help businesses operate smarter.
